COMPLEX LITIGATION, DEPT. 613, AS TO THE FEB-18-2026 HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (FIRST SET), THE COURT CONDUCTS AN INFORMAL DISCOVERY CONFERENCE WITH THE PARTIES INSTEAD OF HEARING ARGUMENT ON THE MOTION. THE COURT WILL CONDUCT A FURTHER INFORMAL DISCOVERY CONFERENCE ON MAR-17-2026 AT 2:00 P.M. IN DEPT. 613. IF THE DISPUTE REMAINS UNRESOLVED ON MAR-17-2026, THE COURT MAY SET A FURTHER HEARIUNG DATE FOR ARGUMENT ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTIUON TO COMPEL. JUDGE: JEFFREY S. ROSS; CLERK: S. KANE; COURT REPORTER: NATALIE VACCAREZZA, CSR NO. 14415, TEL: 707-625-0477, EMAIL: MDRNLEGAL@GMAIL.COM (613)
